offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate expense reporting causes cash flow gaps. We reconcile credit card statements with receipts instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate expense reporting due to mismatched receipts and credit card statements.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on expense reporting
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users manually enter receipts and receive mismatch alerts
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer onboarding for first 10 early-access users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing data
Provide one-click export for simple reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
